raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo man bija Kauns no
ta Kehnina Karra-Spehku un
Jahtuekus luhtt / kas mums
palihdsetu prett teem Eenaidnee-
keem us Zeltu: Jo mehs bijam
us to Kehninu runnajscht/fazzi-
dami : Muhfu Deewa Rohka
irr pahr wiſteem/ kas winnu
mefle/ bet winna Spehks un
Bahrſiba pahr wiſteem / kas no
winna atkahpj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta gawejam un mekle-
jam mehs to no muhfu Deewa/
un wiſsch muhs paklaufsja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atschkihru es diwi-
padefinitis no to Preestern Wirf-
neekem/Serebiju/ Asabiju/ un
defmits no winnu Brahteem ar
wiſneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es eefwehru teem to
Sudrabu un to Selts/ un tohs
Rihkus par Pazelfchanas-Up-
puri muhsu Deewa Namman/
fo tas Kehninsch un winna Pa-
Dohma-Deweji / un winna Leel-
Kungi/ un wiſs Israels/ kas at-
rastins bija/ bij uppureifscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es tad eefivehru wiſneem
Rohka feszsfimts un peezdefmits
Talentus Sudraba / un fiunts
Talentus Sudraba Rihku / un
fiunts Talentus Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un diwidesmits selta Bif-
ferus no tuhkſtofschahin Drak-
nahm/ un diwi Waxxa Tran-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es fazzijn us tee
Juhs effat fivehti tam Ku-
GAM/ tad ir tee Rihki twe
irr/ libds ar to Sudrabu un E-
tu/ kas irr weena Dahwana
labba Prahta tam KUNGAL
juhsu Tehwu Deewam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Effeet mohdrigi un gl-
bajeet to/ kamehr juhs to
fwexkat preeksch teem Wirf-
keem to Preesteru un Lewitu/
to Leel-Kungu to Israeta Teh-
eeksch Jerusalemes / ta Dee-
Namna Rambards.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nehme tee Prees-
un Lewiti to eefwehrtu Selts-
Sudrabu un Rihkus/ ka tee ta-
us Jerusalemi us muhtu Dee-
Nammu nestu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad aifgabjam mehs
tahs Uppees Akewas/ diwipad-
mita Deena ta pirnia Meh-
kamehs uhsJerusalemi eetum/
ta Rohka muhsu Deewa b-
pahr mumis/ un iglahbe mi-
no to Eenaidneeku Rohkas/
kas us mumis us Zeltu gluhsne
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un mehs nahzam u-
Jerusalemi / un palikkam t-
trihs Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un zettorta Deena ta-
Rohka eefivehrts tas Sudra-
un tas Selts/ un tee Rih-
eeksch to Nammu muhsu D-
wa/ Meremotam Urija Dehta-
tam Preesteram / un Eelea-
ram Pineasa Dehtani / un-
teem Josabadam Jesuaſa De-
lat
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
